chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, KARACHI Crl. Misc. Appl. No.1007 of 2023 (Allah Dino v. The State and others) __________________________________________________________ Date Order with signature of Judge __________________________________________________________ 1. For orders on office objection at A 2. For hearing of main case 29.05.2024 Mr. Aftab Ahmed, advocate for the applicant Private respondent Bachal in person Ms. Rubina Qadir, DPG for the State ========= 1. Overruled. 2. The applicant by making an application u/s 22-A/B Cr.PC sought transfer of investigation of the case to some other police officer; it was dismissed by learned Sessions Judge / Ex-Officio Justice of Peace Sujawal vide order dated 28.09.2023, which is impugned by the applicant before this Court by way of the instant Crl. Misc. Application. On asking, learned counsel for the applicant was fair enough to say that the final challan of the case has already been furnished by the police before the Court having jurisdiction. If it is so, then it prima facie suggests that the investigation of the case of the applicant is not pending with the police to be transferred. No illegality even otherwise is noticed in the impugned order which may justify this Court to interfere with the same. Consequent to the above, the instant Crl. Misc. Application is dismissed. J U D G E Nadir*
